sections.paragraph:
Original: בּסודיה

Transliteration: besôdeyâh

Phonetic: bes-o-deh-yaw'

BDB Definition:

Besodeiah = "with the counsel of Jehovah" or " in the secret of the Lord"
  1. father of one of the repairers of the wall of Jerusalem in the time of Nehemiah

Origin: from H5475 and H3050 with prepositional prefix

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
